summary: FASE 1 POS Frontend Testing Complete - All 7 test points PASSED. Tested product card single button (POIN 1), price filter label (POIN 6), checkout step 1 items summary (POIN 7), fulfillment ATP labels (POIN 15), navigation sync (POIN 11), performance (no crashes), and regression (no errors).
passed_tests: POIN 1: Product card single button - Single action button (add-to-cart-button-<id>) found with correct labels ('Pilih Varian & Detail' for multi-variant, 'Lihat Detail & Tambah' for single). Old detail button (product-detail-button-<id>) successfully removed. Button opens ProductQuickView popup correctly.
POIN 6: Price filter label - Label is 'Rentang Harga (Rp)' (NOT 'Rentang Harga (Rp/meter)').

POIN 7: Checkout step 1 items summary - 'Item Pesanan (N)' section (testid: checkout-step1-items) displays correctly with individual items (testid: step1-item-<productId>) showing name, sku, qty, base_unit, and subtotal.

POIN 15: Fulfillment ATP labels - All three new labels found in fulfillment info (testid: cart-item-fulfillment-<productId>): 'Tersedia sekarang', 'Akan datang', 'Bisa dijanjikan' (NOT old short labels).

POIN 11: Navigation sync - Sidebar highlight correctly syncs with active view. When navigating from POS to Orders, sidebar highlights 'Pesanan Penjualan (SO)' (NOT 'POS / Sales Portal'). Navigation back to POS correctly highlights POS again.
PERFORMA: No crashes when selecting customer or adding items to cart. Full POS checkout flow works normally.
REGRESI: No red error screens on Admin home (Control Tower), POS / Sales Portal, or Pesanan Penjualan (Orders). All pages load normally.
